title: roldana kerberi var. kerberi
intro: Roldana kerberi var. kerberi, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and long-lasting, white to yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Roldana kerberi var. kerberi have been associated with several health benefits, including wound healing, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
